fundamentals.name: Astera Labs, Inc.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Astera Labs, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells semiconductor-based connectivity solutions for cloud and AI infrastructure. It offers an intelligent connectivity platform, comprised of semiconductor-based, high-speed, mixed-signal connectivity products that integrate a matrix of microcontrollers and sensors, and COSMOS. The company provides COSMOS software suite, a connectivity system management and optimization software that enables management and optimization of resources for large fleets at cloud-scale via link, fleet, and RAS management capabilities. In addition, it offers PCIe/CXL smart DSP retimers and cable modules; ethernet smart cable modules for cloud and AI infrastructure; CXL memory connectivity controllers; and smart fabric switches. The company serves hyperscalers and system original equipment manufacturers. Astera Labs, Inc. was incorporated in 2017 and is based in San Jose, California.

judgment.summary: Rapidly growing company with high margins and strong analyst conviction, though valuation metrics are stretched.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 13.5%; next earnings date is 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 93.4% YoY and Earnings growth 144.4% YoY indicate strong business expansion.
Gross margin 76.0% and Profit margin 26.7% demonstrate excellent profitability.
Return on equity 21.1% and Return on assets 10.1% show efficient use of capital.
Current ratio 11.30 and Quick ratio 10.55 indicate a very healthy short-term liquidity position.
Strong analyst consensus of 'buy' with 22 analysts covering the stock.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 233.23 and Forward P/E of 81.50 suggest a very high valuation.
Price/Sales (TTM) of 58.68 is exceptionally high, indicating the market is pricing in substantial future growth.
Debt/Equity ratio of 2.80 is on the higher side, though offset by strong liquidity.
Beta of 3.36 indicates high volatility relative to the broader market.
Mean analyst target price of $244.97 is significantly below the current spot price.

news.paragraph: Astera Labs has seen significant positive momentum, with its stock climbing over 30% recently following analyst upgrades and positive coverage. The company's strong Q1 earnings beat, coupled with high revenue and earnings growth rates, has fueled optimism. While analysts remain largely bullish, the current mean target price is below the recent spot price, suggesting a divergence between recent price action and forward-looking analyst expectations.
